scripts.build:electron: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && node -e "try { require('fs').unlinkSync('dist-electron/ipc-contract.js'); } catch (_) { /* optional */ }"
scripts.dev: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k "npm run watch:electron" "vite" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 file:dist-electron/main.js file:dist-electron/preload.js && ELECTRON_IS_DEV=1 electron ."
scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:electron && wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 file:dist-electron/main.js file:dist-electron/preload.js && ELECTRON_IS_DEV=1 electron .
